name: Economy
description: Provides global user cash balances, owner-controlled balance management, an internal cog API, and an optional token-protected HTTP API for other bots or external services.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: Economy loaded! Use `[p]eco balance`, `[p]eco pay`, and owner-only `[p]eco admin` / `[p]eco api` commands.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, global cash balances, and a capped transaction ledger containing user IDs, amounts, reasons, actor IDs, and timestamps.
